nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-breasted parakeet
nodes.summary: White-breasted parakeet（White-breasted parakeet，学名 Pyrrhura albipectus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于厄瓜多尔、秘鲁、原始森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 秘鲁
nodes.summary: 秘鲁是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联962种鸟类，包括北山䳍、高山斑䳍、丽色斑䳍等962种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 厄瓜多尔
nodes.summary: 厄瓜多尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联857种鸟类，包括安第斯斑䳍、红头林䳍、灰䳍等857种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |date=January 2023 |access-date=18 February 2023 }} It is found in southern Ecuador and possibly in adjacent northern Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |date=January 2023 |access-date=18 February 2023 }} It is found in southern Ecuador and possibly in adjacent northern Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: 19: 79 It inhabits the canopy, clearings, and edges of primary subtropical and tropical forest at elevations between though it usually is found below

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Habitat destruction is the principal concern, as upper tropical zone forests east of the Andes are being cleared at an alarming rate." It occurs in Podocarpus National Park and the Tapichalaca Reserve, though the former has lost some habitat due to illegal encroachment. In Tapichalaca Reserve the Fundación Jocotoco has erected nest boxes for the parakeet.Waugh, D
